structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-10-13 Relaunch of UpEquity Bridge Offering
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-10-13 12:01:37-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

In this market, removing a home sale contingency can make all the difference when crafting a competitive offer. Capital Markets is excited to relaunch UpEquity, which offers bridge financing solutions that strengthen the borrower’s offer, enables a smoother transition between homes, and eliminates the need to wait for the current property to sell before closing on the new property. Please read below for additional details.

Channel: Brokered

Product Type: Bridge Loan

 Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EtTzkg-yKI9LnY3HlECVSAABtEOmtoMgRZJnPkDTy1d83Q?e=uhW1uN> 

 Marketing <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EhxaSU5pZwpCn0Zps2kTa58BUUoFtAAw1AVhCaGHkXHHAA?e=8w119b> 

 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	NEW: 0.25 referral fee. 
*	Home must be in an eligible market (and <20 acres)
*	Estimated value is $200k-$5MM
*	Requires approximately 15%+ equity in the current home
*	UpEquity’s Equity Advance loan can be used towards down payment, staging, or moving costs, with a portion to be used to pay off existing liens on the current home.
*	UpEquity provides the borrower a guaranteed offer on the current home to remove the contingency.

	*	If the departing residence doesn’t sell within 6 months, UpEquity will purchase the property at a pre-negotiated price. Once the home sells, the borrower keeps any upside.
